news.title: Stop Killing Games consumer protection bill passes floor vote in California
news.titleEN: Stop Killing Games consumer protection bill passes floor vote in California
news.desc: The California State Assembly has passed the Protect Our Games Act, a bill centred on protecting consumer rights as detailed by the Stop Killing Games movement. Read more
news.descEN: The California State Assembly has passed the Protect Our Games Act, a bill centred on protecting consumer rights as detailed by the Stop Killing Games movement. Read more
